inputs.label: Rotor Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The overall diameter of the rotor swept area, a primary design parameter affecting power capture.

businessContext_i18n.en: The overall diameter of the rotor swept area, a primary design parameter affecting power capture.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rotor süpürme alanının toplam çapı, güç yakalamayı etkileyen birincil tasarım parametresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Gesamtdurchmesser der vom Rotor überstrichenen Fläche, ein primärer Auslegungsparameter, der die Leistungsaufnahme beeinflusst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre total de la zone balayée par le rotor, paramètre de conception principal affectant la capture de puissance.

inputs.label: Air Density
inputs.businessContext: Standard sea-level air density; can vary with altitude and temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard sea-level air density; can vary with altitude and temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart deniz seviyesi hava yoğunluğu; rakım ve sıcaklığa göre değişebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Luftdichte auf Meereshöhe; kann mit Höhe und Temperatur variieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité de l'air standard au niveau de la mer ; peut varier avec l'altitude et la température.

inputs.label: Wind Speed
inputs.businessContext: Mean wind speed at hub height; typically the rated wind speed of the turbine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mean wind speed at hub height; typically the rated wind speed of the turbine.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Göbek yüksekliğindeki ortalama rüzgar hızı; tipik olarak türbinin nominal rüzgar hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittlere Windgeschwindigkeit in Nabenhöhe; typischerweise die Nennwindgeschwindigkeit der Turbine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse moyenne du vent à hauteur de moyeu ; généralement la vitesse nominale de l'éolienne.

inputs.label: Power Coefficient (Cp)
inputs.businessContext: Turbine power coefficient, limited by the Betz limit (~0.593); accounts for aerodynamic losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Turbine power coefficient, limited by the Betz limit (~0.593); accounts for aerodynamic losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türbin güç katsayısı, Betz limiti (~0,593) ile sınırlıdır; aerodinamik kayıpları hesaba katar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Leistungsbeiwert der Turbine, begrenzt durch das Betz-Limit (~0,593); berücksichtigt aerodynamische Verluste.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de puissance de l'éolienne, limité par la limite de Betz (~0,593) ; tient compte des pertes aérodynamiques.

inputs.label: Drive‑Train Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Combined mechanical and electrical efficiency of the gearbox and generator.

businessContext_i18n.en: Combined mechanical and electrical efficiency of the gearbox and generator.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişli kutusu ve jeneratörün birleşik mekanik ve elektrik verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kombinierter mechanischer und elektrischer Wirkungsgrad von Getriebe und Generator.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement mécanique et électrique combiné du multiplicateur et de la génératrice.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
